name: sign_up
description: Create a new user account with email/password or phone/password. Returns the user object and a session with access and refresh tokens.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address for the new user. Required if phone is not provided.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Password for the new user (min 6 characters).

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: Phone number for the new user. Required if email is not provided.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Custom user metadata to store in the user's raw_user_meta_data.

parameters.name: gotrue_meta_security
parameters.description: Security metadata including captcha_token for bot protection.
